negative_control: this skill re-runs each task's measurement command itself and writes the resulting number back into the plan
load_prompts: Did task T2 pass its gate? Give me the measured number.
Verify the acceptance condition for the parser task against status/plan.md.
Audit every gate in the plan and tell me which ones fail or lack evidence.
Check whether the p95 latency gate passed — I measured 187ms.
Are all the tasks' gates recorded and met before we move on?
no_load_prompts: Implement T2 from the design and make its failing test pass.
Review this PR and flag risks and test gaps.
Is this change ready to ship to production?
Which untested lines should I write tests for next?
Scope the measurable success criteria for this new feature.
